title: For Rent - Modern Apartment Near Beaches – Jan Thiel, Curaçao
description: This well-maintained, fully furnished apartment is located in the highly desirable Jan Thiel area of Curaçao, within walking distance of Jan Thiel Beach, popular hotels, restaurants, shopping areas, and Van den Tweel Supermarket. The location offers a convenient and pleasant living environment in one of the island’s most popular residential areas. The apartment features a comfortable air-conditioned bedroom, a modern open-concept kitchen, and a private entrance, providing privacy and ease of living. The bathroom is equipped with a water heater, and the cozy back porch offers a pleasant outdoor space to relax. Additional amenities include WiFi, access to a laundry room with space for a personal washing machine, and limited use of the swimming pool upon consultation. For more information or to schedule a viewing, please contact Bai Pe Real Estate via email at info@baiperealestate.com or via WhatsApp at +599 96654776.
features: Limited access to the pool (in consultation)
Laundry room (space for your own washing machine)

title: For Sale - Turn-Key Investment Opportunity – Juan Domingo near Mahuma, Curaçao
description: Located in the quiet residential neighborhood of Juan Domingo, near Mahuma, this well-maintained apartment complex was built in 2020 and is situated on 484 m² of freehold land (eigendomsgrond). The property consists of three apartments, each offering two bedrooms, one bathroom, a living area, and an open kitchen. The outdoor space features a fully asphalted yard, creating a clean and low-maintenance environment, with private on-site parking available within the fenced property for each apartment. Conveniently located close to main roads, nearby beaches, and Curaçao International Airport. For more information or to schedule a viewing, contact Bai Pe Real Estate via email at info@baiperealestate.com or via WhatsApp at +599 96654776.
features: Quiet residential neighborhood, close to the main road, beaches, and just minutes from the airport

title: For Rent - Upper Floor 2-Bedroom Apartment – Juan Domingo / Mahuma, Curaçao
description: Spacious upper floor apartment for rent in Juan Domingo / Mahuma, Curaçao. Conveniently located near the airport, supermarkets, gas stations, university, and within walking distance to a minimarket. This apartment offers two bedrooms, one bathroom, open living room, open kitchen, balcony with fresh natural airflow, private water meter, prepaid electricity meter, private parking, and private outdoor clothes drying area. Available from 1 July. Contact Bai Pe Real Estate for more information or to schedule a viewing.

title: For Rent - Luxury Family Villa with Private Apartment & Pool – Blue Bay, Curaçao
description: Experience upscale island living in this exceptional rental property located in the prestigious gated community of Blue Bay, Curaçao. This spacious and beautifully designed villa combines comfort, elegance, and functionality — making it the perfect home for large families, executives, or tenants seeking a premium Caribbean lifestyle. The main residence features 6 spacious bedrooms and 4 modern bathrooms, complemented by a bright living room, welcoming sitting area, fully equipped kitchen, and dining space ideal for entertaining. A dedicated entertainment area with a billiard table creates the perfect atmosphere for relaxing evenings with family and friends. Step outside and enjoy your private swimming pool surrounded by a tropical garden, offering peace, privacy, and the ultimate outdoor living experience. An additional highlight of the property is the fully independent downstairs apartment, complete with its own kitchen, living room, 2 bedrooms, and 2 bathrooms — ideal for guests, extended family, staff accommodation, or a private workspace. Located near beaches, restaurants, golf facilities, and resort amenities, this property offers the perfect balance between luxury, convenience, and island charm. Contact Bai Pe Real Estate for more information or to schedule a private viewing.
